news.t: Defiance Launches SOFX, The First 2X Leveraged Single-Stock ETF on SoFi Technologies, Inc.

holdings.infoBox: SOFX is an equity ETF with a total of 13 individual holdings. The top holdings are US DOLLARS stock at 48.39%, SOFI TECHNOLOGIES SWAP CS-L at 30.43%, SOFI TECHNOLOGIES - L -CANTOR at 29.34%, SOFI TECHNOLOGIES SWAP JNST-L at 27.00%, and SOFI TECHNOLOGIES SWAP NBC-L at 25.08%.

overview.description: The Defiance Daily Target 2X Long SOFI ETF (SOFX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund seeks to deliver 2x leveraged exposure to the daily share price movement of SoFi Technologies, Inc. (SOFI), less fees and expenses, through derivatives like swap agreements SOFX was launched on Jan 15, 2025 and is issued by Defiance.

data.title: Defiance Launches SOFX, The First 2X Leveraged Single-Stock ETF on SoFi Technologies, Inc.
data.text: MIAMI, Jan. 16, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Defiance ETFs is proud to unveil SOFX , the first 2X long ETF for SoFi Technologies, Inc. SOFX seeks to provide 200% long daily targeted exposure to SoFi Techn...
